---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement
labels: enhancement
---

[English](feature_request.md) | [中文](feature_request.zh-CN.md)

## Problem

What limitation, friction, or missing capability are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the smallest useful change that would improve the situation.

## Why It Fits Uruc

Explain how this request fits the project direction, plugin model, or contributor workflow.

## Alternatives Considered

List other approaches you considered and why they are less suitable.

## Extra Context

Mockups, logs, protocol examples, or prior discussion links are welcome.
